mapper.select: SELECT SALES_EVENT_SEQ, SALES_EVENT_NM, SALES_EVENT_STR_YMD, SALES_EVENT_END_YMD, PROFIT_AMT, PROFIT_SE_CD, PROFIT_VAT_YN FROM TB_SALES_EVENT ORDER BY SALES_EVENT_SEQ DESC

SELECT SALES_EVENT_SEQ, SALES_EVENT_NM, SALES_EVENT_STR_YMD, SALES_EVENT_END_YMD, PROFIT_AMT, PROFIT_SE_CD, PROFIT_VAT_YN FROM TB_SALES_EVENT WHERE LEFT(SALES_EVENT_STR_YMD, 4) <= #{salesYear} AND LEFT(SALES_EVENT_END_YMD, 4) >= #{salesYear} ORDER BY SALES_EVENT_SEQ ASC
SELECT SALES_EVENT_SEQ, SALES_EVENT_NM, SALES_EVENT_STR_YMD, SALES_EVENT_END_YMD, PROFIT_AMT, PROFIT_SE_CD, PROFIT_VAT_YN FROM TB_SALES_EVENT WHERE SALES_EVENT_SEQ = #{salesEventSeq}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_SALES_EVENT SET SALES_EVENT_NM = #{salesEventNm}, SALES_EVENT_STR_YMD = #{salesEventStrYmd}, SALES_EVENT_END_YMD = #{salesEventEndYmd}, PROFIT_AMT = #{profitAmt}, PROFIT_SE_CD = #{profitSeCd}, PROFIT_VAT_YN = #{profitVatYn} WHERE SALES_EVENT_SEQ = #{salesEventSeq}
